parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='GENERATING', error_message=NULL, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.job_id }}'

UPDATE jobs SET status='WAITING_VIDEO_APPROVAL', error_message=NULL, video_url='{{ $('Send Video Preview').item.json.s3_uri || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.video_url }}', script_json = COALESCE(script_json, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object('media_names', COALESCE(script_json->'media_names', '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object('video_filename', '{{ $('Send Video Preview').item.json.video_filename || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.video_filename }}')), updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ job_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id, video_url: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.video_url, video_filename: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.video_filename, channel_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.channel_id, user_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.user_id, heygen_status: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.status, heygen_video_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.video_id, heygen_avatar_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.avatar_id, heygen_use_avatar_iv_model: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.use_avatar_iv_model, heygen_usage_json: {}, heygen_request_snapshot: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.request_snapshot || {}, heygen_response_snapshot: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json, heygen_cost_usd: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.cost_usd || null, heygen_error: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.error || '' }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='FAILED', error_message='WF-12 영상 후처리 실패: {{ $('Send Video Preview').item.json.error_message || 'video preview failed' }}', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $('Send Video Preview').item.json.job_id || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messenger_source: 'discord', messenger_channel_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.channel_id, job_id: $('Send Video Preview').item.json.job_id || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id, text: '❌ 영상 생성은 완료됐지만 후처리/미리보기 전달에 실패했습니다.\nJob ID: ' + (($('Send Video Preview').item.json.job_id || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id).substring(0,8)) + '\n사유: ' + ($('Send Video Preview').item.json.error_message || 'video preview failed') }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='FAILED', error_message='WF-12 HeyGen 실패: {{ $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.error || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.error_detail || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.status }}', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messenger_source: 'discord', messenger_channel_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.channel_id, job_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id, text: '❌ 영상 생성에 실패했습니다.\nJob ID: ' + $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id.substring(0,8) + '\n사유: ' + ($('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.error || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.error_detail || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.status), cost_event: { job_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id, stage: 'video', process: 'heygen_generate', provider: 'heygen', attempt_no: 1, status: 'failed', usage_json: { video_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.video_id || '', avatar_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.avatar_id || '', use_avatar_iv_model: !!$('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.use_avatar_iv_model }, raw_response_json: { request_snapshot: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.request_snapshot || {}, response_snapshot: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json }, cost_usd: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.cost_usd || null, error_type: ($('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.error_code ? 'heygen_' + $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.error_code : 'heygen_error'), error_message: ($('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.error || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.error_detail || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.status || '') } }) }}
